授業目的: The purpose of this course is for students to learn business fundamentals using English through situational practice, evaluation of information, and the creation of new ideas.
到達目標: Students will be able to: •	Remember and understand main ideas and details from readings and video content through summaries, discussions, and connections  •	Synthesize information and concepts to create new ideas through charts, diagrams, videos, and inventions •	Analyze and evaluate information and data providing comparisons, explanations, inferences, critiques, and recommendations using discourse markers and business vocabulary  •	Communicate through the understanding and use of gestures, eye contact and tone of voice while applying business concepts and vocabulary
授業の概要・背景:
Career English is designed to develop confident, fluent students who can successfully communicate in increasingly competitive, complex, and globalised business environments. It provides students with specific tools to accomplish strategic business goals, that will help advance their career when seeking employment, in Japan or abroad.

This class continues to build on Career English V by learning about the fundamentals of Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) and business. In addition, students will evaluate a company’s CSR efforts before proposing a marketing plan. Students will also utilize multi-media presentations with business English, as well as discuss case studies to apply critical thinking skills. In this way, students will evaluate a CSR problem and propose a practical solution.
授業方法: This course will use a variety of learning activities ranging from lectures, seminars, discussions, presentations, pair work, and group work.Classes are conducted face-to-face in the classroom.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する以下の能力が養成されます。言語教育科目：１．言語コミュニケーション能力：外国語力を生かし、積極的に発信できる。２．異文化理解・多文化共生力：異文化に対する感受性をもち、多様な文化と共生できる。
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: SWOT Presentation (30%); CSR Case Study videos (30%); Class Participation (20%): Assessments 20%
